name: filo
description: Distraction-free, typewriter-style capture tool for writing line by line.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix web run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint --if-present && npm --prefix web run lint --if-present
